name: Stinger Resources Inc.
description: Stinger Resources is an early-stage gold and silver explorer with four properties in British Columbia, Canada, all focused on precious metals in geopolitically safe terrain. The flagship Dunwell Mine property is a past-producing mine located near Stewart in the prolific Golden Triangle, targeting high-grade gold-silver-lead-zinc mineralization, with additional properties at Gold Hill near Fort Steele, Silver Side, and the optioned Ample Goldmax project. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) and is in the exploration stage.
